$comment: CI-only manifest — pins Qt to 6.4.2 for parity with the main ClaudeQt repo. Overlay ports supply ECM, KSH, and qttools from the checked-out registry source.
name: claudeqt-vcpkg-ci
$deps-note: qttools is validated downstream in the main ClaudeQt CI, not here. The host triplet DLL issue (moc.exe STATUS_DLL_NOT_FOUND) makes it impractical to test in a shared-host-triplet CI environment.
